title: frangula viridula
intro: Frangula viridula is a plant species also known as green buckthorn, which belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative and astringent effects, making it a potential remedy for digestive issues and diarrhea. The health benefits of Frangula viridula include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and promote detoxification. Frangula viridula is commonly prepared as a tincture, decoction, or dried extract for use in herbal medicine.
